nasb.text: You have made Your people experience hardship; You have given us wine to drink that makes us stagger.

esv.text: You have made your people see hard things; you have given us wine to drink that made us stagger.

cnv.text: 你使你的子民遇見艱苦； 你使我們喝那令人東倒西歪的酒。

ccb.text: 你叫我们——你的子民吃尽苦头， 喝了令我们东倒西歪的苦酒。

csbs.text: 你使你的子民遇见艰难， 让我们喝了使人踉跄的酒。
